name: Hendvar's Enchanting Tools
description: Portable enchanting station — a toolkit rather than a fixed station.

name: Whetstone of Keen Edge
effect: 1/rest.

name: Everlasting Blue Candles
description: Candles that do not burn down.

name: Boots of the Tireless North
description: Soft leather, northern make, clan stitching along the ankle. Worn looking but perfectly preserved. Sized for small feet.
effect: No movement penalties in difficult terrain (snow, ice, mud, rubble). Travel pace never causes exhaustion regardless of distance covered in a day.

name: Blackwood Wand Focus
description: Blackwood wand usable as a spellcasting focus.
effect: +1 to spell attack rolls and spell save DC.

name: Veilstrike Rapier +2
notes: Main hand. +9 to hit, 1d8+7 damage. Grip Wrap +1 applied.

name: Echo Dagger +2
notes: Off-hand. +9 to hit, 1d4+7 damage.

name: Warden Dagger
notes: Boot dagger. +1 to attack and damage vs fiends and aberrations.

name: Hand Crossbow +2 (Rooting)
effect: Once per turn on a hit: choose to deal damage as normal OR root target in place until end of their next turn.
notes: Primary ranged option.

name: Hand Crossbow (standard)
notes: Backup ranged.

name: Wyvern Scale Coat +2
notes: Vaz's signature look.

name: Bracer of Swift Strikes
notes: Reaction: off-hand attack on main hand hit. Frees bonus action.

name: Helm of Comprehending Languages
notes: Head slot occupied — Hat of Disguise moved to carried/conditional use only.

name: Hat of Disguise
notes: Carried conditionally — head slot taken by Helm of Comprehending Languages when both equipped.

name: Vest of Resistance (Cold)
notes: Stopgap body slot until medium armor acquired. Cold resistance useful for frontliner.

name: Green Cloak of Presence
effect: Advantage on Persuasion and Performance checks. Once per day: hold a room.
notes: Carried by Vaz for conditional use. stat_bonuses are advantage not flat.

name: Ioun Stone of Mastery
effect: Proficiency bonus increases by 1 while attuned.
notes: Orbits the attuned creature's head.

name: Cloak of Unremarkability
effect: Wearer becomes visually uncompelling — the eye slides past without focusing.
notes: Carried by Vaz for conditional use.

name: Wand of Secrets
effect: Detects secret doors and traps within 30ft.

name: Coin of Truth
effect: Ask yes/no questions. Always truthful.

name: Eight Unknown Coins
notes: Large gold coins, unfamiliar crest. Not Western Reach minting. Not any region Vaz immediately recognizes.

name: Bracers of Defense
notes: +2 AC when not wearing armor or using a shield.

name: Ring of Protection +1
notes: +1 AC and saving throws. Stacks with Bracers of Defense.

name: Cloak of Displacement
notes: Attackers have disadvantage until she takes damage each round.

name: Ring of Free Action
effect: Unaffected by difficult terrain, movement speed reduction, and paralysis.

name: Belt of Giant Strength
effect: Sets STR to 27.

name: Greatsword +3
effect: On a critical hit: target makes a STR saving throw or is knocked prone.
notes: Primary weapon. Grip Wrap +1 applied.

name: Ceremonial Horn
effect: Functions as both drinking vessel and musical instrument. Tip opens via hidden clasp. Seal is watertight and airtight.
notes: Pre-clan-separation northern craftsmanship, believed lost. Metalwork band contains pre-separation clan markings.

name: Paired Shortsword
notes: Main hand. Resonance with Pirra's paired shortsword — both gain advantage on first attack each round when within 30ft of each other.

name: Dagger of Swift Strike +1
effect: Once per turn on a hit: immediately make a second strike with this dagger as part of the same attack, without using a bonus action.
flavor: The iridescence pulses faintly when it connects — like something eager being satisfied.
notes: Off-hand. Named privately. Hasn't told anyone.

name: Boots of Elvenkind
notes: Advantage on Stealth checks to move silently.

name: Gloves of Thievery
notes: +5 to Sleight of Hand and to pick locks.

name: Ring of Watchful Eye
notes: +1 Perception, Darkvision, Detect Magic 1/day.

name: Cloak of Arachnida
effect: Spider climb. Immunity to web. Cast Web 1/day.

name: Alchemical Dagger
notes: Passive: proficiency extension on alchemical checks, substance detection on touch.

name: Alchemical Heavy Crossbow
effect: Fires custom alchemical bolts — replaces bomb throwing as primary ranged delivery system. Bolt effects TBD per bolt type. Quieter release than standard heavy crossbow.
notes: Built from Ravine Stalker jaw construction. Commission fulfilled. NOTE: Jaygar not currently proficient with heavy crossbows — needs proficiency resolution (feat, training, or class feature).

name: Alchemical Heavy Crossbow (party copy)
effect: Fires custom alchemical bolts. Bolt effects TBD per bolt type. Quieter release than standard heavy crossbow.
notes: Second commissioned copy. Built from Ravine Stalker jaw construction. Available for party use.

name: Magical Aura Detector
notes: 30ft range.

name: Amulet of Health
notes: Sets CON to 19.

name: Cloak of Displacement
notes: Attackers have disadvantage until he takes damage each round. Second copy — confirmed intentional.

name: Shield of Retribution
effect: When bearer is hit by a melee attack, attacker automatically takes 1d6 force damage.

name: Bracer of Steady Aim
effect: +1 ranged attack. Advantage on concentration saving throws after taking damage.
notes: Stacks with War Caster feat for strong concentration insurance.

name: Wand of Wonder
effect: Cast random magical effect using charges.

name: Warding Vambrace
notes: Reaction 1/day: reduce incoming damage by 1d10+3.

name: Pearl of Power
notes: Recover one expended spell slot up to 3rd level. 1/day.

name: Silvered Shortsword
notes: Backup. +1 to attack and damage vs fiends and lycanthropes (silvered).

name: Gloves of Spellcasting
effect: Every spell cast is treated as one level higher automatically. No limit on uses.

name: Elemental Resistance Robes
effect: Resistance to one element, chosen on attunement. Attuned to: fire.
notes: Fire resistance for a glass cannon who stands in the back.

name: Staff of Evocation
effect: Adds bonus damage to evocation spells.
notes: Used situationally alongside Blackwood Wand — only one focus active at a time when casting.

name: Rapier +2 (Psychic)
effect: On a hit: choose to deal psychic damage instead of piercing.
notes: Primary weapon. Grip Wrap +1 applied.

name: Bracers of Defense
notes: +2 AC when not wearing armor or using a shield. Compatible with Mage Armor.

name: Concentration Robes
effect: Easier concentration checks — something in the weave.

name: Ring of Impact
effect: Stops a harsh impact once per day.

name: The Lexicon
effect: When held as spellcasting focus: spell save DC +2. Once per long rest when casting 3rd level or higher: cast as if one level higher without expending the higher slot.
notes: Spellcasting focus for Kessara. Runes translate loosely as 'the word made sharp'.

name: Mithral Chain Shirt
notes: Emergency fallback only. Superseded by Mage Armor + Bracers of Defense strategy.

name: Waive
effect: Whenever bearer casts a healing spell, all other creatures within 15ft are healed for 2hp.
notes: Primary weapon. Staff, not mace.

name: Shield of Expression
effect: Bearer concentrates to display any image or symbol on the shield face.

name: Amulet of the Devout +2
effect: +2 to spell attack rolls and spell save DC. Must be a cleric or paladin to attune.

name: Medallion of Concentration
effect: Advantage on all concentration checks.
notes: For use with Bless. Reassign to Haste caster when Haste scrolls acquired.

name: Paired Shortsword
notes: Main hand. Resonance with Denna's paired shortsword — both gain advantage on first attack each round when within 30ft of each other.

name: Silvered Shortsword
notes: Backup. +1 to attack and damage vs fiends and lycanthropes (silvered).

name: Gloves of Thievery
effect: Invisible while worn. +5 to Sleight of Hand and lockpicking checks.
notes: Second pair — confirmed intentional.

name: Cloak of the Manta Ray
effect: Breathe underwater. Swim speed 60.
notes: Carried by Pirra.

name: Longsword +2
notes: Party backup. Was Kerra's — replaced by Sword of Sharpness.

name: Sword of Sharpness
effect: On a roll of 20: severs a limb and deals an extra 14 damage on that hit.
notes: Primary weapon. Replaces Longsword +2. Northern metal.

name: Gloves of Dueling
notes: +2 to hit when using a single one-handed weapon.

name: Cloak of Protection +2
effect: +2 to AC and saving throws. Stacks with armor.

name: The Farreach (A)
effect: Advantage on first attack each round when within 30ft of paired ring. +1d6 force damage. Once per day: responsive bonus to an ability or skill check. Always warm.

name: Longbow +2 (Force)
effect: Deals force damage instead of piercing.
notes: Primary weapon. Replaces Whisper Longbow +2 (moved to Sorra).

name: Bow Grip
effect: Reduces moving shot penalty. Fits longbow or recurve.

name: Short Sword
notes: Backup melee.

name: Boots of Elvenkind
notes: Advantage on Stealth checks to move silently.

name: Bracers of Archery
notes: Grants proficiency with longbows and shortbows. +2 damage on ranged attacks with longbows and shortbows.

name: The Farreach (B)
effect: Advantage on first attack each round when within 30ft of paired ring. +1d6 force damage. Once per day: responsive bonus to an ability or skill check. Always warm.

name: Rapier
notes: Backup.

name: Hat of Perception
effect: +1 passive perception. Advantage on Perception checks in dim light or darkness.

name: Cloak of Elvenkind
effect: Advantage on Stealth checks outdoors. Color shifting.

name: Rope of Climbing and Entanglement
effect: 60ft rope, animates on command. Restrain target 1/day.

name: Cloak of Protection
notes: +1 to AC and saving throws.

name: Bracers of Defense
notes: +2 AC when not wearing armor or using a shield. Lyria wears robes — no armor conflict.

name: Belt of Constitution
effect: Sets CON to 18.
notes: Lyria natural CON 12 — belt brings to 18.

name: Robe of Stars
effect: Cast Magic Missile at 5th level using charges. +1 to all saving throws. Can planewalk to the Astral Plane and back as an action.
notes: Lyria still needs robes.

name: Staff of Power
effect: Cast from charges: Magic Missile, Ray of Enfeeblement, Fireball, Lightning Bolt, Cone of Cold, Hold Monster, Wall of Force, Globe of Invulnerability. Functions as +2 quarterstaff. If wielder drops to 0hp: may choose to retributively break it.
notes: Do not break it.

name: Wand of Web
effect: Cast Web using charges.

name: Circlet of Scorching Ray 3
effect: Cast Scorching Ray 3 times per day.

name: Halberd of Warning
effect: While carrying — even collapsed — wielder cannot be surprised and has advantage on initiative rolls. Wakes wielder if danger approaches during sleep. Warning properties require no attunement. Attunement required for +2 bonus.
notes: Weapon set 1: reach/polearm.

name: Longsword +2 (Bronze Flame)
effect: Command word ignites bronze edges — adds 2d6 fire damage to each hit while active.
notes: Weapon set 2: paired with Collapsible Shield +2.

name: Collapsible Shield +2
effect: Caster friendly, lightweight. Collapsible.
notes: Paired with Bronze Flame Longsword as weapon set 2.

name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
effect: Sets STR to 19.

name: Cloak of Protection +1
effect: +1 AC and saving throws. Stacks with armor.

name: Circlet of Mental Fortress
effect: Advantage on INT, WIS, and CHA saving throws. Resistance to psychic damage.

name: Amulet of Health
effect: Sets CON to 19.
notes: Corwin natural CON 18 — brings to 19.

name: Bone Ring of Weapon Retention
effect: Cannot be disarmed.

name: Bracers of Defense +2
effect: +2 AC when not wearing armor or shield.
notes: Monks use Unarmored Defense — no armor conflict.

name: Elemental Resistance Robes
effect: Resistance to one element, chosen on attunement. Attuned to: fire.

name: Ring of Transmutation
effect: 1 charge: Alter Self (no concentration). 2 charges: Polymorph (self only). 3 charges: Gaseous Form.

name: Ring of Jumping
effect: Jump distance tripled.
notes: Pairs well with Monk mobility.

name: The Weaver's Master-Awl
description: A simple ancient bone-handled leatherworking awl. The needle-point glows with a faint psionic violet hue.
effect: Four properties: (1) Psionic Reinforcement — Psychic Blades +2 attack and damage; Psi-Bolstered Knack successes don't expend Psionic Energy die. (2) Tactical Foresight — Help targets two allies, each gains INT mod bonus to next saving throw. (3) Grandmaster's Stitch — during long rest, infuse leather item for 24h: wearer gains psychic resistance and advantage on Charmed/Frightened saves. (4) The Retired Special — once per day reaction: pull ally up to 15ft when hit, potentially causing miss.
notes: Requires attunement by a Rogue.

name: Stormsplit
notes: Appears as a +2 flail dealing radiant damage. Rubbing the handle straightens the chain into a +2 morningstar dealing lightning damage. Switching forms is a bonus action. Named Stormsplit by Revven.

name: Medium Armor
notes: Chain shirt currently. Has a dent he keeps meaning to have fixed.

name: Wand of Magic Missiles
effect: Cast Magic Missile using charges.

name: Hand Crossbow +2
notes: Primary ranged. From Torvaine's shop — can root target on hit once per turn instead of dealing damage.

name: Trident
notes: Preferred melee weapon. Can be thrown. Suits her performance background.

name: Ring of Lightning Resistance
notes: Recovered from Darrock Wilnkarn's lockbox. Hers originally.

name: Leather Armor +1
notes: Good quality, worn in.

name: Whisper Longbow +2
notes: Primary ranged weapon. Reassigned from Siv.

name: Bracers of Archery
notes: Grants proficiency with longbows and shortbows. +2 damage on ranged attacks with longbows and shortbows.

name: Leather Armor +2 (Southern)
effect: Light as cloth, southern make.
notes: AC 14 + DEX mod + 2.

name: The Steadfast
effect: Reaction when ally within 30ft drops to 0hp: grant 1d8 + proficiency bonus temp HP. Once per short rest. Advantage on death saving throws.
notes: No maker's name, no origin runes. Just the inscription.

name: Warhammer
notes: Primary weapon. SHOPPING: upgrade to magical warhammer or maul.

name: Greatsword +2
notes: Temporary — from Corwin until Ferghus gets a proper hammer upgrade.

name: Half Plate
notes: SHOPPING: armor upgrade.

name: Belt of Giant Strength
effect: Sets STR to 21.
notes: Reassigned from Petra.

name: Cloak of Invisibility
effect: Become invisible for up to 1 hour per day. Concentration.
notes: Very on-brand for a paladin of Carix, god of mischief.

name: Necklace of Prayer Beads
effect: Each bead cast once per day. Rolled spells: Bless, Greater Restoration, Cure Wounds, Wind Walk.
notes: Reassigned from Petra.

name: Helmet of Proof
effect: Immunity to charm and fear.

name: Amulet of Poison Immunity
effect: Complete immunity to poison while worn.

name: Berserker's Fang +1
notes: Greataxe. Kept as trophy/display.

name: Ring of Spell Storing (5 levels)
effect: Holds up to 5 levels worth of spells. Any creature can cast a stored spell using the ring.
notes: Held for assignment discussion.

name: Ring of Spell Storing (3rd level)
effect: Holds one spell up to 3rd level. Releases on wearer's command.
notes: Held for assignment discussion.

name: Bracers of Spell Storing
effect: Holds spells up to 5th level.
notes: Held for assignment discussion.

name: Grip Wrap +1 (Vaz — Rapier)
effect: +1 to hit with the wrapped weapon.
notes: Applied to Veilstrike Rapier +2.

name: Grip Wrap +1 (Kessara — Rapier)
effect: +1 to hit with the wrapped weapon.
notes: Applied to Rapier +2 (Psychic).

name: Grip Wrap +1 (Rhuna — Greatsword)
effect: +1 to hit with the wrapped weapon.
notes: Applied to Greatsword +3.

name: Carved Bone Totem
notes: Spellcasting focus. Thirty years old.

name: Hide Armor
notes: Worn and repaired many times.

name: Simple Spear
notes: Hasn't used offensively in fifteen years. Carries from habit.

name: Two Rubies
effect: For Helm of Brilliance reconstruction.

name: Battle Spellbook
effect: Contains: Blight, Fire Shield, Ice Storm, Otiluke's Resilient Sphere, Cone of Cold, Destructive Wave, Immolation, Cloudkill.

name: Scroll of Thunderstorm
effect: Single use. Large area lightning damage.

name: Potion of Greater Healing
effect: Restores 4d4+4 HP.
notes: Well made, reliable.

name: Gemstones
notes: 7 rubies, 6 opals, 4 spinel, 2 sapphire, 5 diamonds.

name: Tome of Clear Thought
effect: Reading takes 48 hours over 6 days. INT score and maximum increase by 2. Becomes mundane for 100 years afterward.
notes: Read on day 121.

name: Bottled Daylight
effect: Releases daylight equivalent illumination when opened.

name: Longsword +2 (party backup)
notes: Backup melee. Carried by Siv.

name: Returning Spear +2
effect: Returns to hand after thrown. On crit: target knocked prone regardless of size.
notes: Returns to hand after thrown. On crit: target knocked prone regardless of size. Complements her trident/performance style.

name: Cloak of Protection +2
effect: +2 to AC and saving throws.
notes: Reassigned to Kessara.

name: Bracers of Swiftness
effect: +10ft movement speed. Dash as bonus action once per short rest.
notes: +10ft movement speed. Dash as bonus action once per short rest. Helps close gap in Half Plate.

name: Alchemical Heavy Crossbow (party copy)
effect: Fires custom alchemical bolts. Quieter release than standard heavy crossbow.
notes: Second commissioned copy. Available for party use.

name: The Right Arm
appearance: Ancient wood of unknown origin, warm to touch regardless of environment. Living moss covers most of the surface. Small flowers bloom and die on their own schedule. Insects appear occasionally that have no business being wherever the bearer currently is. Looks like something that grew rather than something that was made.

modes.name: Spellcasting Focus
modes.description: While held as a spellcasting focus, spell save DC increases by 2. Once per long rest the bearer may cast any spell without expending a spell slot.

modes.name: Melee Weapon
modes.description: +3 quarterstaff. Automatically deals the damage type most harmful to the current target — the staff reads the opponent and responds without the bearer deciding. Once per short rest on a hit, vines erupt from the ground rooting the target in place until the end of their next turn.

modes.name: Wildshape Enhancement
modes.description: When the bearer wilshapes into a non-halfling form the staff merges into them completely. While merged the wildshape form gains +3 to attack and damage rolls, maximum HP increases by the bearer's druid level, and once per wildshape the bearer may cast a cantrip through the form as a bonus action. In Wild Shape: Stars form the staff remains physical and all three modes remain available.

notes: Tackett refers to it as his right arm. Has no given name. Was offered by the Trevash delta spring the morning after Tackett destroyed the ancient spirit that had been corrupting it for centuries. He has never fully explained what the forty days cost him or what the staff's offer meant. The staff has never clarified either.
origin: Trevash delta, approximately Year 368. Offered by the spring itself.
